center.name: Boyd Alexander
center.summary: Boyd Alexander是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Green longtail、Cameroon olive greenbul、Neumann's starling等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cameroon olive greenbul (Phyllastrephus poensis), is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in the Cameroon line (including Bioko)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Gosling's bunting (Emberiza goslingi), also known as the grey-throated bunting, is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae. It is found in Africa from Mauritania and Senegal to south-western Sudan and north-eastern Democratic Republic of Congo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green longtail (Urolais epichlorus) is a bird species of the family Cisticolidae, in the monotypic genus Urolais. It is native to the Western High Plateau and the Cameroonian Highlands forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Neumann's starling (Onychognathus neumanni) or Neumann's red-winged starling, is a bird native to Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Shelley's oliveback (Nesocharis shelleyi), also known as the Fernando Po oliveback, is a species of estrildid finch found in Africa
